_metadata.description: Maps target antigens and disease indications to recommended CAR elements and templates

B_ALL.name: B-Cell Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia
B_ALL.notes: CD19 loss in 30-45% of relapses; tandem CD19/CD22 reduces to <10%. 4-1BB for persistence.

DLBCL.name: Diffuse Large B-Cell Lymphoma
DLBCL.notes: CD28 costim (Yescarta) shows faster responses; 4-1BB (Kymriah/Breyanzi) shows durability.

multiple_myeloma.name: Multiple Myeloma
multiple_myeloma.notes: BCMA is standard target. Carvykti (biepitopic VHH) shows 98% ORR. GPRC5D for BCMA-loss.

AML.name: Acute Myeloid Leukemia
AML.notes: AML targets overlap with normal HSCs → safety switch MANDATORY. CD123, FLT3, CD70 under active investigation.

CLL.name: Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia
CLL.notes: ROR1 is CLL-selective; CD19 also effective but slower responses than in ALL.

gastric_cancer.name: Gastric / GEJ Adenocarcinoma
gastric_cancer.notes: CLDN18.2 is isoform-specific, minimal normal expression. Solid tumor → add homing + anti-exhaustion.

hepatocellular_carcinoma.name: Hepatocellular Carcinoma (HCC)
hepatocellular_carcinoma.notes: GPC3 expressed in 70-80% HCC. AFP secondary target. Solid tumor package recommended.

glioblastoma.name: Glioblastoma Multiforme (GBM)
glioblastoma.notes: IL-13Rα2 (IL13 mutein binder) most clinically advanced for GBM. Intracranial delivery bypasses BBB. EGFRvIII for subset.

mesothelioma.name: Mesothelioma
mesothelioma.notes: Mesothelin is validated target. c-Jun + CCR2b combination showed best preclinical results.

ovarian_cancer.name: Ovarian Cancer
ovarian_cancer.notes: FOLR1 (FRα) expressed in >90% high-grade serous ovarian. Mesothelin (SS1) also relevant.

pancreatic_cancer.name: Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma
pancreatic_cancer.notes: Dense stroma → add heparanase (ECM degradation). TGFβ dominant in PDAC TME → DN or trap.

prostate_cancer.name: Prostate Cancer (CRPC)
prostate_cancer.notes: PSMA most validated. TGFβRII-DN in Phase I (NCT03089671). PSCA for PSMA-negative.

colorectal_cancer.name: Colorectal Cancer
colorectal_cancer.notes: CEA widely expressed but also on normal GI epithelium → lower expression threshold CAR.

breast_cancer_HER2.name: HER2+ Breast Cancer
breast_cancer_HER2.notes: HER2 on cardiac tissue → safety switch MANDATORY. Trastuzumab scFv most validated.

neuroblastoma.name: Neuroblastoma (Pediatric)
neuroblastoma.notes: GD2 is standard neuroblastoma target. IL-18 armor showed impressive preclinical data.

SCLC.name: Small Cell Lung Cancer
SCLC.notes: DLL3 is highly SCLC-selective. Neuroendocrine-specific expression.

SLE.name: Systemic Lupus Erythematosus
SLE.notes: BCMA depletes long-lived plasma cells (autoantibody source). CD19 depletes B cells. Mackensen 2022: 3/3 drug-free remission.

pemphigus_vulgaris.name: Pemphigus Vulgaris
pemphigus_vulgaris.notes: CAAR approach: display Dsg3 ECD as 'bait' for anti-Dsg3 B cells.

myasthenia_gravis.name: MuSK+ Myasthenia Gravis
myasthenia_gravis.notes: MuSK-CAAR targets anti-MuSK B cells. Phase I ongoing.

transplant_rejection.name: Solid Organ Transplant Rejection
transplant_rejection.notes: CAR-Treg recognizes donor HLA to induce local tolerance at graft site.

GvHD.name: Graft-versus-Host Disease
GvHD.notes: CD19 CAR-Treg suppresses allo-reactive B cell antigen presentation. Alternative: donor HLA-specific CAR-Treg.

solid_tumor_engineering_package.description: Recommended additional engineering for any solid tumor CAR

essential.note: 4-1BB + c-Jun OE is minimum for solid tumor persistence

recommended.note: Add homing receptors and TGFβ resistance for hostile TME

advanced.note: Latest 2024 elements; limited clinical data but strong preclinical rationale
